title: Muffin's tech pack [Redstone]
description: A survival and multiplayer friendly modpack for working with redstone(that nerd thing)
body:
# Muffin's tech pack **(MTC)**

### modpack is fully survival and multiplayer friendly
##
The Muffin`s tech modpack aims to provide the **great technical utilites** for redstone stuff. And keep it **optimized enough.**

## This pack is Sodium based

### For optimization there is
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)
  
### And tools for sodium like:

- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)

## For tech tools there is
### Masa's mods:
- [Tweakeroo](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo)
- [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)
- [MiniHud](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud)
- [Item scroller](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-scroller)
### And other:
- [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet) with [Carpet TIS Addition](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet-tis-addition)
- [Chunk Debug](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunk-debug)
- [WorldEdit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit)
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
- [Chat Paches](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches)

## And other cool mods
- [Shulker Box tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [Gamma utils (Fullbright)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) And [Xaero's Worldmap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
- [Zoom mod, made for this modpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/yaszoom)
- [Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify)
- [More chat history](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory)
- [ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus)
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling)
- [Chat heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)

## I Hate Microsoft
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)
- [No Telemetry](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-telemetry)

And more

#

Also, this modpack contains my [Cappuccino Hearts](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cappuccinohearts) Resourcepack :)
